featuremanagement.aio package¶

Module contents¶

Async feature management support.

class featuremanagement.aio.FeatureFilter¶

Bases: ABC

Parent class for all async feature filters.

static alias(alias: str) → Callable[[...], Any]¶

Decorator to set the alias for the filter.

Parameters:

alias (str) – Alias for the filter.

Returns:

Decorator

Return type:

Callable

abstractmethod async evaluate(context: Mapping[Any, Any], **kwargs: Any) → bool¶

Determine if the feature flag is enabled for the given context.

Parameters:

context (Mapping) – Context for the feature flag.

property name: str¶

Get the name of the filter.

Returns:

Name of the filter, or alias if it exists.

Return type:

str

class featuremanagement.aio.FeatureManager(configuration: Mapping[str, Any], **kwargs: Any)¶

Bases: FeatureManagerBase

Feature Manager that determines if a feature flag is enabled for the given context.

Parameters:

configuration (Mapping) – Configuration object.

Keyword Arguments:

  • feature_filters (list[FeatureFilter]) – Custom filters to be used for evaluating feature flags.

  • on_feature_evaluated (Callable[EvaluationEvent]) – Callback function to be called when a feature flag is

evaluated. :keyword Callable[[], TargetingContext] targeting_context_accessor: Callback function to get the current targeting context if one isn’t provided.

async get_variant(feature_flag_id: str, *args: Any, **kwargs: Any) → Variant | None¶

Determine the variant for the given context.

Parameters:

feature_flag_id (str) – Name of the feature flag

Keyword Arguments:

targeting_context (TargetingContext) – Targeting context.

Returns:

Variant instance.

Return type:

Variant

async is_enabled(feature_flag_id: str, *args: Any, **kwargs: Any) → bool¶

Determine if the feature flag is enabled for the given context.

Parameters:

feature_flag_id (str) – Name of the feature flag.

Returns:

True if the feature flag is enabled for the given context.

Return type:

bool

class featuremanagement.aio.TargetingFilter¶

Bases: FeatureFilter

Feature Filter that determines if the user is targeted for the feature flag.

async evaluate(context: Mapping[Any, Any], **kwargs: Any) → bool¶

Determine if the feature flag is enabled for the given context.

Keyword Arguments:

context (Mapping) – Context for evaluating the user/group.

Returns:

True if the user is targeted for the feature flag.

Return type:

bool

class featuremanagement.aio.TimeWindowFilter¶

Bases: FeatureFilter

Feature Filter that determines if the current time is within the time window.

async evaluate(context: Mapping[Any, Any], **kwargs: Any) → bool¶

Determine if the feature flag is enabled for the given context.

Keyword Arguments:

context (Mapping) – Mapping with the Start and End time for the feature flag.

Returns:

True if the current time is within the time window.

Return type:

bool
